title: Filthy Fresh Filipino Lemon Ginataang Bilo-Bilo
description: A refreshing, anti-inflammatory-friendly Filipino dessert featuring lemons, ginataang sauce, and bilo-bilo. This dish is perfect for post-workout recovery or as a light dessert.

ingredients.name: coconut milk
ingredients.notes: full-fat coconut milk for best results

ingredients.name: lemon juice
ingredients.notes: freshly squeezed lemons for optimal flavor

ingredients.name: tapioca pearls
ingredients.notes: also known as bilo-bilo or sago

instructions: Combine coconut milk, sour cream, lemon juice, ginger paste, honey, turmeric powder, and salt in a blender until smooth.
Strain the mixture through a fine-mesh sieve to remove any ginger particles.
Bring 2 cups of water to a boil in a medium saucepan.
Add tapioca pearls and cook until they float to the surface, about 10 minutes.
Pour the ginataang sauce into the saucepan with the cooked tapioca pearls and stir to combine.
Serve warm in individual hot stone plates.
Garnish with fresh lemons and a sprinkle of turmeric powder, if desired.
Serve immediately, as the tapioca pearls will absorb the sauce over time.
